Settings

  1. Home
  2. Settings
Two-Factor AuthProtect your account with authenticator-based verification.
Not enabledSecurity

Two-Factor Authentication

Protect your account with a time-based one-time password from Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any compatible TOTP app.

Step 1

Scan this QR code with your authenticator app

If you prefer, you can copy the setup key below and enter it into a compatible authenticator app manually.

Press “Enable 2FA” to generate a QR code and provisioning URI.

What you need

  • Any TOTP-compatible authenticator app on your phone or desktop.
  • The QR code or provisioning URI shown here.
  • A fresh 6-digit code to verify before 2FA becomes active.
Keep your authenticator app accessible. If you lose it before adding recovery codes, signing back in will be harder.
